purpose: Broaden the Mode 2 mirror search from 30 source columns to candidate involutions on 900-vertex source graphs.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
A 900-vertex graph involution is not by itself a WXYZTI row generator.
Candidate transforms are tested from a finite hand-built family.
Row induction is still scored against projection-derived row labels.

claim.short_form: No exact 900-vertex mirror involution was found in the tested transform family.
claim.not_closed_reason: The tested vertex transforms do not derive the full WXYZTI row grouping from source.

interpretation.main_result: The tested 900-vertex transform family does not reveal a source-side mirror involution.
interpretation.remaining_gap: Even with a vertex involution, we still need a source-derived map from 900 carrier structure to WXYZTI rows.
interpretation.next_move: Broaden from hand-built transforms to source-discovered automorphism orbits.
